<!--
Thank you for contributing! Please fill out the information below to help us review your Pull Request quickly.
-->

### Description
Provide a clear description of the changes introduced by this PR and the reasoning behind them.

### Related Issue
Closes #[issue-number] (if applicable)

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

### How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. 
- [ ] Installed HestiaCP on a test VM/VPS.
- [ ] Ran `./install.sh` successfully.
- [ ] Verified QuickInstall App works via Web UI.
- [ ] Verified CLI integration works (`v-add-pm2-app`).
- [ ] Other (please describe):

### Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`README.md`, `README.pt-BR.md`, `CHANGELOG.md` if applicable) accordingly
